vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely inconsistent with the visual evidence. P1 (String of Nickels) is not visible in the yellow pot. P2 (Mexican Mint) and P4 (Silver Guest) are not identifiable as distinct specimens. P3 (Pothos) is represented only by the white rabbit anchor; the plant itself is absent or entirely obscured.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss (Yellow pot appears empty/soil only)
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss (Pothos foliage absent; only anchor remains)
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss (No identifiable silver guest foliage)

plant_audit.P1_Yellow_Pot: Empty soil surface; no String of Nickels detected.
plant_audit.P2_P4_Black_Pot_A: Contains only soil and scattered eggshell fragments; no plant matter.
plant_audit.P3_Black_Pot_B: Contains white rabbit anchor; no Pothos foliage present.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Dark, damp appearance across all pots. No fungal blooms detected.
biome_observations.biome_anomalies: Persistent presence of crushed eggshell fragments in the central black pot. No active plant growth detected in any container.

temporal_deltas.T_minus_4_to_T_minus_1: Stagnation. No growth or change in soil surface topography.
temporal_deltas.T_minus_1_to_Current: No change. The biome remains in a state of total dormancy or systemic failure.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: All specimens are currently in a state of 'Systemic Loss'. There is no evidence of active photosynthesis or vegetative structure. The environment is currently a collection of empty pots with inert soil.
vision_report.anomalies: The presence of eggshell fragments suggests a previous attempt at soil amendment or pest deterrence, but the lack of plant life renders this ineffective.
vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a multi-stage audit of the provided image sequence. My first action was to map the physical containers against the provided registry. Upon validation, I confirmed that the registry does not match the current visual reality: all four registered plants are absent. The pots contain only soil and debris. The 'white rabbit' anchor is the only consistent element across the timeline. The biome is currently devoid of living botanical specimens.
